Field Label:
BMRC grades :


0 = no muscular contraction
1 = contraction, but no joint movement
2 = movement, but not against gravity
3 = movement against gravity but not against resistance
4 = movement against resistance, but not full strength
5 = normal, no weakness

Note:

  • Entire limb = 5 muscle groups (MG),
  • Proximal (both upper and lower) = 3 MG, Distal (both upper and lower) = 2 MG 
  • When scoring, always round to the worse BMRC grade • E.g.5-=4,4+=4)
Choices, Calculations, OR Slider Labels: 1, BMRC 0-1 in all 4 limbs OR Quadriplegia | 2, BMRC 0-1 in two limbs (bilateral LE or one side) OR BMRC 2 in 3-4 limbs OR Paraplegia or hemiplegia OR Severe quadriparesis | 3, BMRC 3 in > 2 MG OR BMRC 2 in two limbs (bilateral LE or one side) OR BMRC 0-1 in one extremity OR Monoplegia OR Severe paraparesis or hemiparesis OR Moderate quadriparesis | 4, BMRC 4 in > 2MG OR BMRC 3 in 1-2 MG OR BMRC 0-2 in 1 MG OR Severe monoparesis OR Mild to moderate paraparesis or hemiparesis | 5, BMRC4in1-2MG OR Minimal disability (not meeting other criteria)
